# Avante Visibility
> AI visibility audits and digital marketing services that help businesses get recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, and Gemini.

## About
Avante Visibility is a boutique digital marketing practice specializing in AI search visibility (GEO - Generative Engine Optimization). Founded by JoLyn Laney, 20+ years in digital marketing. Based in Las Vegas, NV. Serving businesses nationwide.

## Services
- [AI Visibility Audit](https://avantevisibility.com/ai-visibility-audit): Tests whether AI platforms recommend your business. Starting at $297.
- [GEO Audit](https://avantevisibility.com/geo-audit): Full generative engine optimization audit with 28+ AI search queries. $2,500.
- [Review Intelligence Audit](https://avantevisibility.com/review-audit): Deep analysis of review sentiment, patterns, and competitive gaps. $197.
- [Google Business Profile Audit](https://avantevisibility.com/gbp-audit): Comprehensive GBP listing optimization review. $197.
- [Technical SEO Audit](https://avantevisibility.com/technical-seo-audit): Site crawl, Core Web Vitals, schema, and indexation analysis. $997.
- [Speed & Core Web Vitals Audit](https://avantevisibility.com/speed-audit): Page performance and loading speed analysis. $497.
- [Conversion Funnel Audit](https://avantevisibility.com/conversion-audit): Identifies where visitors drop off and how to fix it. $997.
- [Competitor Intelligence Report](https://avantevisibility.com/competitor-intelligence): Reverse-engineers competitor strategies and finds gaps. $797.
- [Algorithm Recovery Audit](https://avantevisibility.com/algorithm-recovery): Diagnoses traffic loss after Google updates with recovery plan. $1,497.
- [Google Ads & Landing Pages](https://avantevisibility.com/google-ads): Campaign setup from $497, management from $397/mo.
- [Monthly AI Visibility Plans](https://avantevisibility.com/monthly-plans): Ongoing AI visibility monitoring and optimization from $1,500/mo.

## Packages & Bundles
- [All Packages & Pricing](https://avantevisibility.com/packages): Individual audits, bundles, and enterprise packages.
- [White-Label Agency Program](https://avantevisibility.com/partners): Wholesale pricing for agencies, no minimums.
